chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-837 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of M.A. No.4302/2013 2. For hearing of main case 03.03.2021 Mr. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan advocate for petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. -.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioners states that the petition has served its purpose as appointment orders in favour of the petitioners have been issued by the competent authority. In view of the above, the petition and listed application, having served their purposes, stand disposed of with no order as to costs. J U D G E J U D G E Ali Haider
